# Webtor.io

> Webtor is a free online torrent streaming platform. It lets users watch videos, listen to audio, and download files from torrents directly in the browser — no software installation required.

## What Webtor Does

- Streams video and audio from torrent files or magnet links in the browser
- Transcodes content on-the-fly to HLS for universal playback
- Supports subtitles (SRT, ASS, VTT) with automatic charset detection
- Provides a download option for any file in a torrent
- Offers an embeddable player via JavaScript SDK for third-party websites
- Works without registration for basic usage

## How to Use

1. Go to https://webtor.io
2. Upload a .torrent file, paste a magnet link, or paste an infohash
3. Browse the torrent contents and click any file to stream or download

## API

Webtor provides a REST API for developers:
- Documentation: https://webtor.io/api
- Embed SDK (npm): @webtor/embed-sdk-js

## Premium Features

- Faster streaming speeds (up to 50 Mbps)
- No ads
- Vault storage (save files for instant access later)
- 7-day free trial available at https://webtor.io/donate

## Links

- Website: https://webtor.io
- Blog: https://blog.webtor.io
- GitHub: https://github.com/webtor-io
- Chrome Extension: available in Chrome Web Store (search "Webtor")
